hero.title: Explore Cogni’s Magical & Playful Universe
hero.subtitle: Join Cogni the corgi on interactive adventures that spark curiosity, creativity, and early skills through a beautifully illustrated storybook paired with a fun, activity-filled app.
hero.imageAlt: Cogni the Corgi and his friend stepping through a magical portal – Illustration from the Cogni Adventures children's book

bookSection.title: The Cogni Adventures Book
bookSection.description: A colorful, captivating storybook that fuels imagination and makes every reading moment playful and engaging.
bookSection.bookTitle: Why Kids and Parents Love The Cogni Adventures
bookSection.seasonDesc: Each season unlocks a new magical quest—perfect for reading, playing, and exploring all year long.
bookSection.multimediaDesc: Pair the book with our free app to activate audio narration, mini-games, and exclusive surprises.
bookSection.educationalDesc: Stories and activities built to encourage logic, creativity, curiosity, and confidence—always with fun at the center.

appSection.title: The Cogni App – Extend the Adventure
appSection.description: Turn every story into a personalized interactive experience with our playful app for children aged 3 to 10.
appSection.createStoryDesc: Each season generates unique episodes inspired by the time of year, keeping your child engaged and excited.
appSection.gamesDesc: Each episode unlocks puzzles, logic challenges, creative activities, and small interactive games that make learning joyful.
appSection.printStoryDesc: Combine your favorite episodes and print a unique book to enjoy together.

benefitsSection.title: Benefits & Whole-Child Growth
benefitsSection.description: Our long-term goal is to offer playful learning that supports the child’s overall development through interactive stories and immersive activities.
benefitsSection.cognitiveDesc: Visual riddles, logic puzzles, and memory challenges nurture observation, reasoning, and problem-solving.
benefitsSection.motorDesc: Coloring, simple tracing, and hands-on interactions strengthen coordination and precise movements.
benefitsSection.languageDesc: Rich storytelling, guided narration, and multilingual reading encourage expression and comprehension.
benefitsSection.socialDesc: Adventures centered on friendship, courage, and cooperation help children develop empathy, confidence, and emotional awareness.

aboutUsSection.title: About Us
aboutUsSection.subtitle: Meet the team behind Cogni’s playful adventures.
aboutUsSection.teamDesc: Cogni’s Adventures was created by parents, storytellers, and creatives passionate about blending play, imagination, and digital experiences for children aged 4 to 10.
aboutUsSection.missionDesc: To create engaging, evolving, and inspiring experiences that help children develop key skills while having fun with Cogni the corgi.
aboutUsSection.beliefDesc: We believe in the power of storytelling to inspire, spark wonder, and support children as they explore the world around them.

ctaSection.title: Get a Free Story
ctaSection.description: Download a free original Cogni Adventures story and receive new seasons, playful activities, and exclusive updates directly in your inbox.
ctaSection.subscribedDesc: Thank you for subscribing! Your story is on its way.

footer.title: The Cogni Adventures
footer.description: Magical stories that spark curiosity and support your child’s early development through play and adventure.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} The Cogni Adventures. All rights reserved. Designed with 🩵 in Canada – Québec ⚜️

toastMessages.buyInterestDesc: The purchase feature is coming soon. Stay tuned!
toastMessages.appDownloadDesc: The companion app will be available soon on iOS and Android!

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Cogni's Adventures
faq.ageQuestion: What age is the book suitable for?
faq.ageAnswer: The book is designed for children ages 3–10.
faq.contentQuestion: What kind of content does the book include?
faq.contentAnswer: The book includes interactive stories, educational puzzles, and activities that promote cognitive, motor, language, and social-emotional development.
faq.languagesQuestion: Is the book available in multiple languages?
faq.languagesAnswer: Yes, the book is available in English, Spanish, and French.
faq.appQuestion: Is there a companion app for the book?
faq.appAnswer: Yes, our companion app extends the book experience with additional interactive content and games.

website.title: Cogni's Adventures — Interactive Children's Book and Educational App
website.description: Discover Cogni's Adventures — an interactive children's book and educational app that builds cognitive, language, motor, and social-emotional skills for kids ages 3–10.
website.keywords: children's book, kids book, interactive book, educational app, kids learning app, social-emotional learning, language development, printable stories, corgi, Cogni's Adventures
website.author: Cogni's Adventures

structuredData.name: Cogni's Adventures
